description: Paper, report, and claim-grounding tasks with source-aware synthesis.

verifier.pass_signal: main claims are backed by cited sources and limitations are explicit

mini_tasks.goal: Cross-validate octopus architecture claims across multiple local sources with explicit date checks, claim mapping, and explicit gap reporting.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return a compact, artifact-backed research synthesis for research-mini-5 that preserves field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata; validate at least three local source dates, map each claim to local evidence, and return partial with explicit gap metadata when evidence is missing.

mini_tasks.goal: Ground one sentence about octopus distributed control using provided sources.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: A short synthesis with source coverage and uncertainty.

mini_tasks.goal: Compare two project reference claims and separate biological analogy from benchmark evidence.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Two cited claim mappings, one explicit limitation, and no benchmark overclaim.

mini_tasks.goal: Build a three-claim evidence map for one Octopus architecture paragraph and label source-backed, inferred, and unverified parts.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Three claim rows with source coverage, inference labels, uncertainty notes, and no fabricated citation.

mini_tasks.goal: Verify clean-brain context-policy evidence for the research domain by checking explicit Goal/Mem/Need/Feed separation and tentacle-side tool-and-verifier responsibility using local repository sources.
mini_tasks.expected_feed: Return a compact, artifact-backed summary that preserves field_pack, field_mini_task, and field_expected_feed in Feed metadata and writes verifier evidence to .octopus/field-mini-task/.
